description.content:
The Capital API provides endpoints for embedding [Adyen Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/capital) into your marketplace or platform. With Capital, you can offer business financing to your users as grants. When a user receives a grant, they must repay the grant amount in a specified term, in addition to paying a fee for using this service.

With these endpoints, you can:
- **Get available financing offers**: You can get a list of offers with fixed amounts or a range of available financing for your users. Adyen configures the financing amount, the fee, and the repayment conditions for each offer. These configurations are based on proactive risk analyses that Adyen performs on your users.
- **Make requests for grants**: When a user selects a financing offer, you can make a request for the grant on their behalf.
- **Get information about your grant account**: Your grant account tracks the information of all grants in your marketplace or platform.

## Authentication
Each request made to the Capital API must be signed with an API key. Generate an API key in your Customer Area.

To connect to the API, add an `X-API-Key` header with the API key as the value, for example:

 ```
curl
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \n-H "X-API-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \n...
```

## Roles and permissions
To use the Capital API, your API credential must have the following roles:
- **Balance_Platform_Capital_Configuration_Role**
- **Balance_Platform_Capital_Grant_Initiation_Role**

Reach out to your Adyen contact to set up these roles.
## Going live
When going live, generate an API key in your [live Customer Area](https://ca-live.adyen.com/ca). You can then use the API key to send requests to `https://balanceplatform-api-live.adyen.com/capital/v{version}`.

item.name: /grantOffers
item.description: Returns a list of all [static offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/static-offers) available for `accountHolderId` specified as a query parameter. This also includes static offers created for financing amounts that the user selected from [dynamic offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/).

query.description: The unique identifier of the account holder for which you want to get the available static offers.

request.description: Returns a list of all [static offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/static-offers) available for `accountHolderId` specified as a query parameter. This also includes static offers created for financing amounts that the user selected from [dynamic offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/).

item.name: /grantOffers/:id
item.description: Returns the details of the specified static offer.

item.name: Get the details of a static offer

variable.description: The unique identifier of the static offer.

request.description: Returns the details of the specified static offer.

item.name: /dynamicOffers
item.description: Returns a list of all [dynamic offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/) available for `accountHolderId` specified as a query parameter.

query.description: The unique identifier of the account holder that the dynamic offer is for.
The type of financing that the offer is for. If the value is not specified, returns all available types.  Possible values: **businessFinancing**

request.description: Returns a list of all [dynamic offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/) available for `accountHolderId` specified as a query parameter.

item.name: /dynamicOffers/:id/calculate
item.description: Calculates a preliminary offer for the financing amount that the user selected from a [dynamic offer](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/). The preliminary offer is for informational purposes only and cannot be used to initiate a grant.  Requests to this endpoint are subject to rate limits:  - Live environments: 120 requests per minute.  - Test environments: 120 requests per minute.

item.name: Calculate a preliminary offer for a selected financing amount

variable.description: The unique identifier of the dynamic offer from which the user selected the financing amount.

request.description: Calculates a preliminary offer for the financing amount that the user selected from a [dynamic offer](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/). The preliminary offer is for informational purposes only and cannot be used to initiate a grant.  Requests to this endpoint are subject to rate limits:  - Live environments: 120 requests per minute.  - Test environments: 120 requests per minute.

item.name: /dynamicOffers/:id/grantOffer
item.description: Creates a static offer for the financing amount that the user selected from the [dynamic offer](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/).  Requests to this endpoint are subject to rate limits:  - Live environments: 30 requests per minute.  - Test environments: 30 requests per minute.

item.name: Create a static offer for a selected financing amount

variable.description: The unique identifier of the dynamic offer from which the user selected the financing amount.

request.description: Creates a static offer for the financing amount that the user selected from the [dynamic offer](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers/).  Requests to this endpoint are subject to rate limits:  - Live environments: 30 requests per minute.  - Test environments: 30 requests per minute.

item.name: /grantAccounts/:id
item.description: Returns the details of the specified grant account. This account tracks existing grants in your marketplace or platform.

item.name: Get the information of your grant account

variable.description: The unique identifier of the grant account.

request.description: Returns the details of the specified grant account. This account tracks existing grants in your marketplace or platform.

item.name: /grants
item.description: Returns a list of all the grants of a specific account holder.

item.name: Get all the grants of an account holder

query.description: The unique identifier of the account holder that received the grants.

request.description: Returns a list of all the grants of a specific account holder.

item.name: /grants
item.description: Make a request for a grant on behalf of an account holder.

item.name: Make a request for a grant

request.description: Make a request for a grant on behalf of an account holder.

item.name: /grants/:grantId
item.description: Returns the details of the specified grant.

item.name: Get the details of a grant

variable.description: The unique identifier of the grant reference.

request.description: Returns the details of the specified grant.

item.name: /grants/:grantId/disbursements
item.description: Returns the disbursements of a specified grant.

item.name: Get all the disbursements of a grant

variable.description: The unique identifier of the grant reference.

request.description: Returns the disbursements of a specified grant.

item.name: /grants/:grantId/disbursements/:disbursementId
item.description: Returns the details of a disbursement specified in the path.

variable.description: The unique identifier of the grant reference.
The unique identifier of the disbursement.

request.description: Returns the details of a disbursement specified in the path.

item.name: /grants/:grantId/disbursements/:disbursementId
item.description: Update the percentage of your user's net income that is deducted for repaying the grant.

item.name: Update the repayment configuration of a disbursement

variable.description: The unique identifier of the grant reference.
The unique identifier of the disbursement.

request.description: Update the percentage of your user's net income that is deducted for repaying the grant.
